context: Nerdkle organs are preserved on GitHub and fixture-tested, but production input surfaces are missing or not pointed at the running daemons.
next_action: Locate or create the real production input surfaces without using fixture proof as production proof.

required_evidence.proof: Path exists, SQLite readback lists LiveReceipt and shadow_cache schema, and one real row can be selected without mutation.
Path exists, JSON parses, and at least one file-status row shape is documented.
Directory exists and can receive a timestamped Markdown receipt from crawler.
Canonical or fallback outbox exists and unread/read marker rules are documented.

pass_condition: A production input readback receipt is written under foreman/source-truth/receipts.
No destructive production mutation occurs during discovery.
Any later Ender deletion remains separately human-gated if docs/ is involved.
failure_condition: Ben has to remember where the DB lives.
Fixture proof is treated as production proof.
A daemon keeps running against fixture paths without a visible blocker.
